overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a vibrant Asian-inspired cyberpunk district. The player navigates from narrow alleys with red lanterns to wide streets under elevated highways, passing neon-lit storefronts, vending machines, and futuristic vehicles. The scene transitions from enclosed commercial walkways to an open area with a Militech armored vehicle and a canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley transitioning to commercial street

events.description: exits narrow brick alley into wider urban street with cyberpunk architecture
turns right onto main sidewalk, passing air conditioning units

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight alleyway and emerging onto sunlit city street

notable_agents.action: futuristic SUV driving past the alley exit

entered.detail: graffiti-covered brick wall with green and red paint layers
traditional Asian paper lantern hanging above the alley
multiple external AC units mounted on building exterior
multi-story building with neon signs and external wiring
blue and yellow automated vending machine on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow service alley with weathered brick walls and hanging red paper lanterns. The camera emerges onto a sunlit cyberpunk street, passing external air conditioning units and turning right along the sidewalk. A futuristic SUV drives past in the distance as the scene opens up to reveal multi-story commercial buildings with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with elevated highway overhead

events.description: passing under elevated highway creates dappled shadow patterns on street
approaching and crossing pedestrian crosswalk at intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along commercial sidewalk and crossing street at intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright yellow building facade with green trim and posters
pair of blue automated vending machines with yellow accents
massive concrete highway structure casting shadows on street below
tall palm tree visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a vibrant commercial street under an elevated highway overpass. The yellow building facade and blue vending machines line the left side while pedestrians walk in the same direction. The camera crosses a street intersection, passing from shadow to sunlight, with palm trees visible in the distance and neon signs illuminating the storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with military vehicle checkpoint

events.description: entering area beneath elevated highway with reduced natural light
approaching Militech armored vehicle with steam venting nearby

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass toward the parked Militech vehicle

notable_agents.action: person standing near the Militech vehicle observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large black armored SUV with Militech corporate branding and red lights
white steam venting from a pipe or grate in the street
construction barriers lining the edge of the street
colorful gaming arcade cabinets on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment moves under the massive elevated highway structure where lighting becomes mixed between shadow and bright sunlight. The camera approaches a black Militech armored vehicle parked on the street with steam venting nearby. Arcade machines line the left sidewalk while construction barriers appear on the right, and pedestrians stand observing the military vehicle.

events.description: slowing down while passing the Militech vehicle and observing the canal
approaching canal waterway with urban decay buildings visible across the water

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the Militech vehicle and canal area, taking in the surroundings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing by the railing looking at the canal

entered.detail: water-filled canal running parallel to the street with concrete walls
dilapidated multi-story buildings with broken windows across the canal
low-lying steam or smoke drifting across the street surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a canal running alongside the street, with the camera slowing to observe the Militech vehicle and surrounding area. Pedestrians stand by the railing looking at the water, while steam drifts across the street. The elevated highway curves away to the left, exposing more sky, and dilapidated buildings show urban decay across the canal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, traditional alleyway into a sprawling, neon-lit commercial district. It begins amidst weathered brick walls and hanging red paper lanterns, moving forward until it emerges from the narrow passage onto a sunlit street. As the camera turns right and passes external air conditioning units, the view expands to reveal multi-story buildings and a futuristic SUV driving in the distance. The scene then shifts beneath the shadow of an elevated highway overpass, gliding past yellow facades and blue vending machines alongside a flow of pedestrians. Finally, the camera crosses a street intersection, transitioning from shade back into bright sunlight where neon storefronts and distant palm trees define the open urban landscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway into an open urban vista overlooking a city canal. It begins by gliding under the massive concrete structure where harsh sunlight mixes with deep shadows, approaching a black Militech armored vehicle parked amidst venting steam. As the camera passes arcade machines and construction barriers, the perspective shifts to reveal pedestrians gathered around the military transport. The scene then expands as the highway curves away to the left, exposing more of the sky and opening up to a canal where people lean against the railings. Finally, the view settles on the contrast between the armored vehicle and the dilapidated buildings showing urban decay across the water.
